requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: For Honduras PV inverter projects, EMC evidence should be aligned with the standard named by the project owner, OHN-adopted standards where applicable, and CREE/ENEE interconnection expectations. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment and draws on IEC 61000-series test methods; harmonic current and emission evidence may also be requested under IEC 61000-series standards. Because Honduras uses a 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid environment, EMC and harmonic reports should identify the test voltage, frequency, power rating, firmware profile, and grid-code configuration used for the tested inverter.
summary.zh: 洪都拉斯光伏逆变器项目的EMC证据应与项目业主指定标准、适用的OHN采纳标准以及CREE/ENEE并网预期保持一致。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，并采用IEC 61000系列测试方法；谐波电流和发射证据也可能按IEC 61000系列标准要求提交。由于洪都拉斯采用60 Hz / 120-240 V电网环境，EMC和谐波报告应说明测试电压、频率、功率等级、固件配置及被测逆变器所用电网代码配置。
summary.zht: 宏都拉斯光伏逆變器項目的EMC證據應與項目業主指定標準、適用的OHN採納標準以及CREE/ENEE併網預期保持一致。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，並採用IEC 61000系列測試方法；諧波電流和發射證據也可能按IEC 61000系列標準要求提交。由於宏都拉斯採用60 Hz / 120-240 V電網環境，EMC和諧波報告應說明測試電壓、頻率、功率等級、韌體配置及被測逆變器所用電網代碼配置。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits, including harmonic and emission evidence where applicable
OHN / project-owner standards adoption to be confirmed for the specific Honduras project

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly tied to GB/T 37408 and domestic CNAS test reports. While Chinese test programmes may use IEC 61000-family methods, the certificate scope, limits, grid conditions, and firmware settings may not match IEC 62920 or Honduras project requirements. China reports generated at 50 Hz / 220-380 V should not be treated as proof of EMC and harmonic behaviour at Honduras 60 Hz / 120-240 V conditions unless the report scope explicitly covers those conditions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常与GB/T 37408及国内CNAS测试报告相关。尽管中国测试方案可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但证书范围、限值、电网条件和固件设置未必匹配IEC 62920或洪都拉斯项目要求。在50 Hz / 220-380 V条件下形成的中国报告，不应在报告范围未明确覆盖的情况下被视为证明洪都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V条件下EMC和谐波行为的证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常與GB/T 37408及國內CNAS測試報告相關。儘管中國測試方案可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但證書範圍、限值、電網條件和韌體設置未必匹配IEC 62920或宏都拉斯項目要求。在50 Hz / 220-380 V條件下形成的中國報告，不應在報告範圍未明確覆蓋的情況下被視為證明宏都拉斯60 Hz / 120-240 V條件下EMC和諧波行為的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes domestic EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is not a clean substitute for an IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 evidence package requested for a Honduras project. Exporters should map each Chinese EMC report to the Honduras specification, confirm whether the laboratory accreditation and test configuration are acceptable, and retest if the existing report does not cover 60 Hz, 120/240 V or 240 V service, the same model rating, and the same firmware grid profile.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408 EMC证据不能直接替代洪都拉斯项目要求的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据包。出口商应将每份中国EMC报告映射到洪都拉斯规格，确认实验室资质和测试配置是否可接受；若现有报告未覆盖60 Hz、120/240 V或240 V供电、相同型号功率等级及相同固件电网配置，应进行复测。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408 EMC證據不能直接替代宏都拉斯項目要求的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據包。出口商應將每份中國EMC報告映射到宏都拉斯規格，確認實驗室資質和測試配置是否可接受；若現有報告未覆蓋60 Hz、120/240 V或240 V供電、相同型號功率等級及相同韌體電網配置，應進行複測。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in procurement and grid-interconnection technical submissions where IEC EMC evidence is specified
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T EMC evidence supports China domestic voluntary certification or procurement requirements but does not automatically satisfy Honduras project specifications

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a China GB/T 37408 EMC certificate is enough for Honduras. Prepare an IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 mapping, confirm OHN or project-owner acceptance, and make the 60 Hz / 120-240 V test configuration visible in the evidence package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书足以用于洪都拉斯。应准备IEC 62920 / IEC 61000映射，确认OHN或项目业主是否接受，并在证据包中清楚列明60 Hz / 120-240 V测试配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書足以用於宏都拉斯。應準備IEC 62920 / IEC 61000映射，確認OHN或項目業主是否接受，並在證據包中清楚列明60 Hz / 120-240 V測試配置。
